category_sources: source_facts.description says SWA CLI is a local development tool for Azure Static Web Apps; official Azure GitHub README says it serves as a local development tool for Azure Static Web Apps.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title is Azure Static Web Apps CLI; official docs site brands it as Static Web Apps CLI.
docs_sources: Official Azure GitHub Pages documentation is dedicated to the CLI; Microsoft Learn provides the official CLI command reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Azure GitHub Pages docs link to the Azure/static-web-apps-cli GitHub repository, and the GitHub README describes the SWA CLI.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe local development, emulation, and deployment for Azure Static Web Apps.
